title: Bytes, Unicode, Newlines, Front Matter, Metadata, and Schemas · Failure Triage
summary: A preserved build trace contains one plausible source, path, encoding, metadata, parser, renderer, template, URL, asset, accessibility, security, cache, package, deployment, or release defect; locate the first failed boundary before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in versioned decoded-document and metadata contract and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugg…
objectives: Decode source bytes with declared UTF-8 and error policy while preserving path, byte count, newline behavior, and causal diagnostics.
Choose normalization, identifier, comparison, sorting, and display policies while retaining original author text.
Recognize bounded delimiters, separate metadata bytes from body, reject malformed closure, and avoid executing content.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-static-site-python cumulative production static-site generator portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python parser, route, render, graph, and publication models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py,
Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production effects
require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class PublicationPolicy:
    base_path: str = "/handbook/"
    encoding: str = "utf-8"
    raw_html_allowed: bool = False
    max_document_bytes: int = 262_144
    max_nesting_depth: int = 64


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class BuildEvidence:
    revision: str
    content_manifest_digest: str
    route_manifest_digest: str
    artifact_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python static-site generator portfolio ready"

steps.title: Static-site publishing and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Time Language Identity
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: ssg-time-language-identity-c1z54s" that uses case 4449 to decode UTF-8 content and validate bounded front matter without hiding data loss. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not claim native filesystem, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py, Jinja, validator, browser, GitHub, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN, cache, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, CommonMark 0.31.2 fixtures, markdown-it-py 4.2.0, Jinja 3.1.6 strict autoescape, pytest 9.1.1, standards validators, real browsers, clean package installs, reproducible artifacts, staged deployment, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

Evidence target: Static-site publishing and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Time Language Identity.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Time Language Identity into observable performance evidence. For Static-site publishing and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Time Language Identity, keep Time Language Identity connected to executable Python source, parse, route, render, accessibility, artifact, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: ssg-time-language-identity-c1z54s
# Competency: ssg-time-language-identity.
# Case 4449: a compromised-content recovery rehearsal.
# Operating constraint: preserve source spans, Unicode policy, trust classification, route base, contextual encoding, diagnostics, and accessibility decisions.
# Changed case: zoom a translated long-form page to 400 percent at mobile width with images and code blocks.
def evidence_ssg_time_language_identity_c1z54s(byte_count: int = 240, decoded_units: int = 228, metadata_fields: int = 6, decode_errors: int = 0, schema_errors: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_c1z54s = "c1z54s-s45z1c-4449"
    assert evidence_variant_c1z54s
    evidence_axes_c1z54s = (
        "readerc1z54s",
        "source4449",
        "parses45z1c",
        "routec1z54s4449",
        "artifact4449c1z54s",
        "recoverys45z1c4449",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_c1z54s)) == 6
    if byte_count < 0 or decoded_units < 0:
        return False, decoded_units, "text-count"
    if decoded_units > byte_count:
        return False, decoded_units, "encoding-units"
    if metadata_fields < 3:
        return False, metadata_fields, "metadata-shape"
    if decode_errors > 0 or schema_errors > 0:
        return False, decode_errors + schema_errors, "invalid-document"
    assert byte_count >= decoded_units
    return True, metadata_fields, "validated-document"
